query: SELECT cg.id as grupo_id, cg.name as grupo_nome, cg.minQuantity, cg.maxQuantity, cg.sortOrder, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementItems ci WHERE ci.groupId = cg.id) as total_itens FROM products p JOIN complementGroups cg ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210008 AND p.name LIKE '%PIZZA TREM%' ORDER BY p.id, cg.sortOrder, cg.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT cg.id as grupo_id, cg.name as grupo_nome, cg.minQuantity, cg.maxQuantity, cg.sortOrder, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementItems ci WHERE ci.groupId = cg.id) as total_itens FROM products p JOIN complementGroups cg ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210008 AND p.name LIKE '%PIZZA TREM%' ORDER BY p.id, cg.sortOrder, cg.id;
